skills.description: Deep privacy compliance audit — Consent Mode v2, pre-consent tag firing analysis, CMP integration, tag-level consent mapping, PII exposure scan, regional regulation compliance (GDPR, CCPA, DMA, LGPD), cross-border data transfer risks
Container governance audit — tag/trigger/variable naming against Platform-Action-Detail convention, folder organization, consistency analysis, adoption scoring, maintainability assessment

Cross-platform measurement audit — event parity matrix across GA4/Google Ads/Meta/LinkedIn/TikTok/Amplitude/Mixpanel, destination data validation, remarketing gaps, enhanced conversions, attribution gap analysis

Data layer architecture audit — variable inventory, ecommerce schema compliance, data flow tracing (dataLayer → variable → tag), Custom JS audit, timing/race condition detection, orphaned variable cleanup

Comprehensive container health audit — tag sequencing and firing order, page performance metrics (tags per trigger phase, estimated load time), paused/redundant tag detection, destination platform validation, hardcoded value detection, folder organization
Professional resume review — clarity, impact, ATS compatibility, formatting
